name: Clarity AD lecanemab early Alzheimer's disease trial
summary: An 18-month multicenter randomized phase 3 trial testing lecanemab against placebo in early Alzheimer's disease with amyloid evidence.
population: 1795 adults aged 50 to 90 years with early Alzheimer's disease and amyloid evidence by PET or cerebrospinal fluid testing

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Protein Aggregate Clearance because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, function, and safety in 1795 adults aged 50 to 90 years with early Alzheimer's disease and amyloid evidence by PET or cerebrospinal fluid testing. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
